meta.title: The best places to watch a rocket launch in Florida!
meta.description:
So…. You’re in Florida and want to watch a rocket launch huh? Perhaps Falcon Heavy? Maybe another SpaceX launch, or even a different launch provider’s rocket. Well today I wanted to give you a run down on the best locations for watching rockets launch on the space coast. We’ll show you pictures and videos from each location to help you make the best decision on launch day.

I also got tips from people on twitter to give you some advice on how to best be prepared for launch day!

But say you can’t make it down to Florida, where can you watch online? I’ll let you know the best places for that too!

The FULL rundown on my website with all relevant links -
https://everydayastronaut.com/where-to-watch-rocket-launches-in-florida/

Buy tickets from Kennedy Space Center - https://www.kennedyspacecenter.com/

SpaceXNOW app - https://www.spacexnow.com/

We Are Go Vacationauts app - http://www.wearegofl.com/

Launch Alarm app - https://launchalarm.com/

Stay up to date with SpaceflightNow - https://spaceflightnow.com/launch-schedule/

Playalinda Beach - (321) 267-1110
https://www.nps.gov/cana/planyourvisit/conditions.htm

Exploration Tower - http://www.explorationtower.com/

LaunchRats - http://launchrats.com/

Ben Cooper's Guide - http://launchphotography.com/Delta_4_Atlas_5_Falcon_9_Launch_Viewing.html

Show your support and join our discord channel by becoming Patron - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut

Music by Everyday Astronaut - http://soundcloud.com/everydayastronaut

Everyday Astronaut hats, prints, shirts and more at - https://everydayastronaut.com/shop/

SpaceX models by Oli Braun http://twitter.com/oli_braun and his store - https://www.buzzspacemodels.com/

Translations:
French - Gaetan Lafitte
